code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut has_positive = false
  mut max_val = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut num = 0
  mut started_digits = false

  while i <= n
    let b = if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        32
      end
    else
      32
    end

    let is_space = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13

    if is_space
      if in_num and started_digits
        let v = num * sign
        if v > 0
          if not has_positive
            max_val = v
            has_positive = true
          else if v > max_val
            max_val = v
          end
        end
      end
      in_num = false
      sign = 1
      num = 0
      started_digits = false
    else
      if not in_num
        in_num = true
        sign = 1
        num = 0
        started_digits = false
        if b == 45
          sign = -1
        else if b == 43
          sign = 1
        else if b >= 48 and b <= 57
          num = b - 48
          started_digits = true
        end
      else
        if b >= 48 and b <= 57
          num = num * 10 + (b - 48)
          started_digits = true
        end
      end
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  if has_positive
    println("max=#{max_val}")
  else
    println("none")
  end
end
